title: Short Shield
body:
![Difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8381e817093884ba3305b44a9dfd86f8c56891c.jpeg)![UN blocked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e48f06c39f69fe7e872ad8181e8c0e65aa01dff5.jpeg)
📋 About

The shield is smaller, so it does not block as much from the image. This is especially useful in PVP situations.

❓ How to use

Copy the pack into your resource packs folder or Drag and Drop it in the Resource pack Selection. Select the pack.
